title: Click Add Child on tapped node creates + auto-pins visible child
intent: Regression guard for Wave-6 add-child bug (commit 5f02337f) — exercise the createNewChildNodeFromUI path end-to-end via the editor toolbar.
likelyStatusToday: should PASS against commit 5f02337f (matches Cho's live delta=1 observation); fails pre-5f02337f
judgeFocus: domProbes.cyNodeCount is greater than the cyNodeCount captured at step 1 (delta >= 1).
floatingEditors contains an editor id for the newly-created child node, not only the tapped node.
selectedNodeHasEditor remains true after the child is created and selected.
